title: Evolution of a Discrete Stochastic Process
description: A flowchart illustrating how a stochastic process evolves over discrete time steps, highlighting the role of the current state and probability distributions in determining the next state.
relationships: Process starts at an Initial State (X₀)
At each Time Step (t), the system is in a Current State (X_t)
A Probability Distribution (P) defines the likelihood of moving to any possible next state
The Next State (X_{t+1}) is determined by sampling from this distribution, and the process repeats
